zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Stewart Earl Of Menteith, Fife, Atholl, And Buchan於1340年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾歐文時，他的父親Robert Earl of Strathearn Stewart24歲，母親Countess of Atholl Elizabeth Mure20歲。他於1363年與Margaret Graham在蘇格蘭結婚。他去世於1420年9月3日在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特林享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Stewart Earl Of Menteith, Fife, Atholl, And Buchan于1340年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾歐文时，他的父亲Robert Earl of Strathearn Stewart24岁，母亲Countess of Atholl Elizabeth Mure20岁。他于1363年与Margaret Graham在苏格兰结婚。他去世于1420年9月3日在英国苏格兰斯林史爾斯特林享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Stewart Earl Of Menteith, Fife, Atholl, And Buchan was born in 1340, in Irvine, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Earl of Strathearn Stewart, was 24 and his mother, Countess of Atholl Elizabeth Mure, was 20. He married Margaret Graham in 1363, in Scotland. He died on 3 September 1420, in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Stewart Earl Of Menteith, Fife, Atholl, And Buchan est né en 1340, à Irvine, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Earl of Strathearn Stewart, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Countess of Atholl Elizabeth Mure, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Graham en 1363, à Écosse. Il est décédé le 3 septembre 1420, à Stirling, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Stewart Earl Of Menteith, Fife, Atholl, And Buchan 1340 in Irvine, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Earl of Strathearn Stewart 24 und seine Mutter Countess of Atholl Elizabeth Mure 20. Er hat 1363 in Scotland Margaret Graham geheiratet. Er starb am 3. September 1420 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Stewart Earl Of Menteith, Fife, Atholl, And Buchan è nato il nel 1340 nel Irvine, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Earl of Strathearn Stewart, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Countess of Atholl Elizabeth Mure, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Graham nel 1363, nel Scotland. Morì il 3 settembre 1420, nel Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Stewart Earl Of Menteith, Fife, Atholl, And Buchan(이)가 1340년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 이르빈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Earl of Strathearn Stewart(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess of Atholl Elizabeth Mure(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1363년 스컷랜드에서 Margaret Graham(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1420년 9월 3일 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Stewart Earl Of Menteith, Fife, Atholl, And Buchan nasceu em 1340, em Irvine, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Earl of Strathearn Stewart, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Countess of Atholl Elizabeth Mure, tinha 20 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Stewart Earl Of Menteith, Fife, Atholl, And Buchan родился в 1340 г. в местности ирваин, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Earl of Strathearn Stewart было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Countess of Atholl Elizabeth Mure, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Graham в 1363 г. в местности Шотландия. Он умер 3 сентября 1420 г. в местности стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Stewart Earl Of Menteith, Fife, Atholl, And Buchan nació en 1340, en Irvine, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Earl of Strathearn Stewart, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Countess of Atholl Elizabeth Mure, tenía 20 años.
